name: 2-Day Tour: Marrakech → Zagora Desert via Ait Ben Haddou

seo.title: 2-Day Marrakech to Zagora Tour — Desert & Ait Ben Haddou | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 2-day tour from Marrakech: Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Draa Valley, Zagora desert. Night in a Berber tent, camel ride at sunset.

hero.tagline: Ait Ben Haddou, Ouarzazate & the Zagora dunes

intro: This 2-day tour takes you from Marrakech to the gates of the Zagora desert, about 360 km (7 hours) from the Red City. The road crosses the High Atlas peaks via Tizi n'Tichka, the UNESCO-listed ksar of Ait Ben Haddou, then descends into the magnificent Draa Valley dotted with palm groves and kasbahs.
